name: Aspen Group
analysis: APZ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$5.0200. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.1100, stop A$4.1481, target A$5.7900 (0.71:1) — then trail it.
